creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
When building py-fonttools with cython, the following additional files are part of the package:

lib/python3.9/site-packages/fontTools/cu2qu/cu2qu.c
lib/python3.9/site-packages/fontTools/cu2qu/cu2qu.cpython-39.so
lib/python3.9/site-packages/fontTools/feaLib/lexer.c
lib/python3.9/site-packages/fontTools/feaLib/lexer.cpython-39.so
lib/python3.9/site-packages/fontTools/misc/bezierTools.c
lib/python3.9/site-packages/fontTools/misc/bezierTools.cpython-39.so
lib/python3.9/site-packages/fontTools/pens/momentsPen.c
lib/python3.9/site-packages/fontTools/pens/momentsPen.cpython-39.so
lib/python3.9/site-packages/fontTools/qu2cu/qu2cu.c
lib/python3.9/site-packages/fontTools/varLib/interpolate_layout.py
lib/python3.9/site-packages/fontTools/varLib/iup.c
lib/python3.9/site-packages/fontTools/varLib/iup.cpython-39.so
